name: Pacing Optimization
description: Optimizes campaign pacing and spend delivery to ensure budget is spent efficiently throughout the campaign period, avoiding early burnout or underdelivery.

en.trigger: Use when reviewing or optimizing campaign pacing — ensuring consistent spend delivery, avoiding early burnout or underdelivery, and maximizing performance throughout the flight period.
en.context: You are a media strategist who manages campaign pacing to ensure efficient budget utilization and consistent performance delivery across the entire campaign period.
en.instructions:
## Pacing Optimization Workflow

Optimize campaign pacing and delivery:

- [ ] 1. Delivery analysis: Assess current spend pace vs. expected pace
- [ ] 2. Burn rate review: Identify if campaigns are over or under-delivering
- [ ] 3. Pacing diagnosis: Understand why pacing issues are occurring
- [ ] 4. Adjustment planning: Plan bid/budget adjustments to correct pace
- [ ] 5. Dayparting review: Assess if scheduling adjustments help
- [ ] 6. Audience pacing: Check if pacing varies across audiences
- [ ] 7. Implementation: Apply changes with monitoring plan

## Key Inputs
- Campaign: {{campaign_name}}
- Budget: {{budget}}
- Flight dates: {{flight_dates}}
- Delivery target: {{delivery_target}}
en.output_template:

steps.name: Delivery Analysis
steps.action: Compare current spend to expected pace

steps.name: Burn Rate Review
steps.action: Assess daily burn rate against remaining budget and days

steps.name: Root Cause Analysis
steps.action: Diagnose why pacing issues are occurring

steps.name: Adjustment Planning
steps.action: Plan specific bid and budget changes

steps.name: Implementation
steps.action: Apply changes with clear monitoring plan

examples.input: TechStart campaign is on day 12 of 30-day flight, has spent 72% of budget. Need to fix pacing before overspend. Budget: AED 150,000.
examples.output: Full pacing analysis with specific bid/budget adjustments to bring delivery back on track

checklist: Burn rate and trajectory are clear
Root cause of pacing issue is understood
Changes are implemented with monitoring plan
